greeting: Thank you for calling Ristorante Bella! My name is Aria. How can I help you today?

starters.name: Bruschetta
starters.description: Toasted bread with tomatoes and basil

starters.name: Soup of the Day
starters.description: Ask your server for today's soup

starters.name: Calamari
starters.description: Crispy fried squid with lemon aioli

mains.name: Grilled Salmon
mains.description: With seasonal vegetables and lemon butter sauce

mains.name: Ribeye Steak
mains.description: 10oz, cooked to your preference, served with fries

mains.name: Mushroom Risotto
mains.description: Creamy arborio rice with wild mushrooms and parmesan

mains.name: Chicken Parmesan
mains.description: Breaded chicken breast with marinara and mozzarella

mains.name: Pasta Primavera
mains.description: Tagliatelle with seasonal vegetables, olive oil, garlic

mains.name: Margherita Pizza
mains.description: San Marzano tomato, fresh mozzarella, basil

desserts.name: Tiramisu
desserts.description: Classic Italian dessert with espresso and mascarpone

desserts.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
desserts.description: Warm chocolate cake with vanilla ice cream

desserts.name: Cheesecake
desserts.description: New York style with seasonal berry compote

drinks.name: House Wine
drinks.description: Red or white, ask for today's selection

drinks.name: Soft Drink
drinks.description: Coke, Diet Coke, Sprite, or Orange Juice

faq.reservations: We accept reservations for parties of 2 to 12. We recommend booking at least 48 hours in advance, especially for weekends.
faq.children: We are very family-friendly. We have high chairs available and a children's menu. Children under 5 eat for free with a paying adult.
faq.dietary: We cater to most dietary requirements including vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free. Please let us know about any allergies when ordering.
faq.parking: We have free on-site parking for up to 2 hours with a receipt.
faq.hours: We are open Monday to Thursday 12pm to 10pm, Friday and Saturday 12pm to 11pm, and Sunday 12pm to 9pm.
faq.dress_code: We have a smart casual dress code — please avoid sportswear and flip-flops.
faq.private_dining: Yes, we have a private dining room for events of up to 30 guests. Please call us directly to discuss your event.
faq.takeaway: We are a dine-in restaurant only — we do not offer takeaway or delivery.
